name: SKELETON_ORIGIN+TARGET__FIRST_DISCLOSURE_DETAIL__DETAIL_RECORD__ALL_TIME
description: Independent frame skeleton for first-disclosure detail lookup under origin + target constraints.
cypher_template:
MATCH (o:Origin {name: $origin})<-[:ORIGIN_FROM]-(a:Assignee)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]->(tp:TargetPair)-[:HAS_TARGET]->(t:Target {symbol: $target})
MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WITH o, a, p, tp, y
ORDER BY y.year ASC, p.pub_no ASC
RETURN o.name AS origin, tp.name AS target_pair, y.year AS first_year, a.name AS assignee, p.pub_no AS patent_publication
LIMIT 10
examples: For the leading combinations from China that contain TLR9, what are the origin, first patent publication year, assignee, and patent publication number for the earliest filing?
For the leading combinations from US that contain CSPG4, what are the origin, first patent publication year, assignee, and patent publication number for the earliest filing?
For the leading combinations from Personal that contain BMPR1A, what are the origin, first patent publication year, assignee, and patent publication number for the earliest filing?
